title: Design System: 摄影器材管理

display.purpose: Page headings and the home greeting name.

headline.purpose: Section titles and important row titles.

body.purpose: Task content, buttons, and equipment information.

shadows.name: floating-only
shadows.purpose: FABs and temporary floating layers only.

rules: One content surface uses either a divider or a shadow, never both.
Blue expresses one primary action or current selection per screen.
Lists group related rows instead of repeating floating cards.
